title: Delivery target
text: SIVO delivers to the optician agency or professional pickup point, never directly to the final patient. Delivery ETA is always approximate and depends on agency and sector planning.

title: Num client first
text: For order tracking and order creation, num_client must be collected first before continuing with order details or status confirmation.

title: Price policy
text: Price ranges are indicative only. Final price must be confirmed against the current commercial catalog and product configuration.

title: Availability policy
text: Availability is never guaranteed from memory alone. The agent must confirm with tools, catalog, or backoffice before making a commitment.

title: Medical safety
text: The assistant can restate order parameters and optical values but must not provide diagnosis, treatment advice, or medical recommendations.
